name: Line Counter
description: Counts the number of lines in a text string.
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode

class LineCounterNode(BaseNode):
    name = "Line Counter"
    
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.icon_path = "icons/hash.svg"
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-START]
        self.add_input("text", "string", widget_type="text_area")
        self.add_output("count", "int")
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-END]
        
    async def execute(self, inputs):
        text = inputs.get('text', '')
        return {'count': len(str(text).splitlines())}

def register_node():
    return LineCounterNode
